description: CPH-aligned Book of Concord linkmap with abbreviation resolver, citation parsing helpers, article titles, and Markdown citation formatting.

abbreviations.Tr: Treatise on the Power and Primacy of the Pope

notes: For AC, Ap, FC-E, and FC-SD, map Roman numerals to article keys.
For LC, interpret the first Roman numeral as the chief part and the following Arabic numeral as the article or petition number when present.
For SC, resolve named sections through aliases.
Return only links present in this file.
